positive: An ultra-detailed, stylized linocut illustration of a majestic grizzly bear standing amidst glowing forest flora. The bear is depicted in a confident, centered, silhouette-style pose, surrounded by abstract elements like detailed ferns, mystical glowing mushrooms, and stylized constellations visible through the canopy. Use strong chiaroscuro contrast with deep forest greens, burnt umber, and pops of ethereal cyan light. Flat graphic design aesthetic combined with hyper-detailed natural elements, high contrast, clean linework, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Minimalist framing, forest scene, wildlife, mystic, vector art quality, symmetrical composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, sloppy, cartoon, digital painting, low detail, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, photorealistic, gradient, complex shadows
